channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Ice Spice Jokes That Her McDonald’s Fight ‘Wouldn’t Happen at Wendy’s’
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to today's podcast, where we're diving into the latest celebrity news. You might have seen a viral video making the rounds online, featuring rapper Ice Spice in an altercation at a McDonald's in Hollywood, California. Let's break it down.
[Short music transition]
Host: So, what happened? According to reports, Ice Spice was at the McDonald's with a friend when another woman approached and tried to start a conversation. When Ice Spice declined, things escalated, and the woman allegedly slapped her, sparking a brief scuffle. The incident was caught on security footage, which has since been shared online.
[Short music transition]
Host: Ice Spice herself has poked fun at the incident on social media, reposting the security footage on X and captioning it, "This wouldn’t happen at Wendy’s." Interestingly, the 26-year-old rapper was in Los Angeles to shoot a commercial for Wendy's, and her bio on X and Instagram lists "@wendys princes." It's also worth noting that Ice Spice collaborated with Dunkin' in 2023 and appeared in an ad alongside Ben Affleck.
[Short music transition]
Host: Ice Spice's attorney, Bradford Cohen, has released a statement saying they'll be exploring all avenues to hold the perpetrators responsible for their actions. Cohen also mentioned that the incident has been reported to the LAPD, and they're looking into holding the location responsible for their apparent lack of security.
[Outro music plays]
Host: That's all for today. Thanks for tuning in. If you want to check out Ice Spice's post on X, we'll have a link in our show notes. Until next time, stay up to date with the latest celebrity news and trends. [Outro music continues to play]
